type.description: The visual style of the banner.

message.description: The main content of the banner. Accepts text or JSX.

title.description: An optional bold heading displayed above the message.

headingLevel.description: Heading element used for the title (h1-h6) so the page heading outline includes the banner.

icon.description: Custom icon to replace the default type-based icon.

showIcon.description: Whether to display an icon in the banner.

dismissible.description: Whether the banner can be dismissed via a close button.

autoDismiss.description: Auto-dismiss after this many milliseconds. Shows a progress bar.

onDismiss.description: Callback fired when the banner is dismissed.

visible.description: Controls the visibility of the banner externally.

position.description: Position of the banner. Top sticks to viewport top.

pageLevel.description: When true, renders the banner via createPortal to document.body.

pushContent.description: When combined with pageLevel, pushes page content down.

className.description: Additional CSS class name for custom styling.

actions.description: Action buttons or elements rendered alongside the message.

bordered.description: Adds a left border accent matching the banner type color.

restoreFocusOnDismiss.description: On dismiss, return focus to the element that was focused when the banner appeared.
